title: verbascum stelurum
intro: Verbascum stelurum, also known as the mullein, is a biennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its tall spikes of yellow flowers and large, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Verbascum stelurum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Verbascum stelurum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
